title: Zinnia tenuis
taxonomy: Zinnia tenuis is classified in the family Asteraceae, which is commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its flower structure and leaf arrangement. Within the Asteraceae family, Zinnia tenuis is also a member of the genus Zinnia, which includes various species of flowering plants. The genus Zinnia is further divided into several species, and Zinnia tenuis is one of them. By classifying Zinnia tenuis in this way, botanists can better understand its relationships with other plants and its evolutionary history.
